deltaBuckets.highestImpactFinding: HUD/status crop deltas for cancel/resurrect/reincarnate are dominated by compared visual-state buckets: Firestaff/original inputs alternate between all-black, Firestaff gray status HUD, and original brown Hall top band. This is a capture/semantic-stop alignment blocker before renderer pixel parity can be interpreted.

semanticStopAlignment.finding: For cancel/resurrect/reincarnate HUD/status crops, the original corrected captures are consistent with terminal Hall source stops; Firestaff is captured after synthetic M11 status messages or an all-black status stop, so these HUD/status rows cannot be used for renderer parity yet.
semanticStopAlignment.nextVerifier: replace or mask Firestaff terminal HUD/status crops with source-stop-aligned frames before reinterpreting pass449 pixel deltas

nonClaims: no HUD/status parity claim for non-zero rows
classification describes comparator input/state buckets, not renderer equivalence

passRule: COMPARE_COMPLETE requires manifest provenance+hash validation and all Firestaff/original scene-region PNG comparisons recorded. Partial panel_visible comparisons are diagnostic only; pixel parity for a region is differingPixels == 0 with matching original data provenance and source-bound matching state.
